query:
UPDATE platform_settings SET 
  stripeMonthlyPrice = 3990,
  stripeProAnnualPrice = 39900,
  stripeUnlimitedMonthlyPrice = 8990,
  stripeUnlimitedAnnualPrice = 89900
WHERE id = 1;
